node.text:
A cold brew, classic rock, dog-cuddling, desert-lovin kinda chick. Lmk if that's your type 🥵

blonde sponsored by @prolonged.hair
Such potential but the low effort 0F content is holding her back
I didn’t kmow I had a type before seeing this 😂😍
yes and the last pic is the best 😍🔥
